original: An Akkadi-brand personal heating device, worn as a belt to generate a field of warmth around the user. While it won’t protect from the elements per se, it will allow you to traverse extremely cold environments without too much discomfort.\n\nNote: Heat Belts are worn in the same slot as personal shields.
